summary: S2-03 Roadmap page and S2-04 PPT export with roadmap slide fully verified. All 6 backend tests pass. Frontend: Roadmap page renders correctly with 8 projects, tooltip works, quarter toggle works, Export COPIL modal shows include-roadmap-checkbox checked. Capacity alerts badge (1) still visible on Équipes in sidebar.
critical_code_review_comments: Roadmap.jsx sidebar link a[href='/roadmap'] is present and active (highlighted) but does not have data-testid='sidebar-roadmap' — minor testability issue, no functional impact
ExportCopilModal: slide count formula (~{2 + ...}) is displayed correctly and updates when include_roadmap is toggled
context_for_next_testing_agent: S2-03 Roadmap and S2-04 PPT export fully validated. Roadmap page at /roadmap shows 8 projects grouped by 4 programs with colored RAG bars, tooltip on click, quarterly/monthly zoom toggle. Export COPIL modal has include-roadmap-checkbox (data-testid='include-roadmap-checkbox'), PPT with roadmap > 50KB confirmed via API test. Sidebar 'Roadmap' link works. Équipes capacity alerts badge shows 1.
